Article With No Date

This article has no structured date signal anywhere in the document. There is no JSON-LD script block, no meta published_time or date tags, and no time element with a datetime attribute. The extractor should return null for this page.

This tests that our extractor gracefully handles pages with no date signal and returns null rather than throwing an error or returning an invalid date value. The absence of a structured date is a common case and must be handled without any side effects or errors.
